examples: Answers can be written or presented orally on tape.
They were passed down orally within cultures from generation to generation, so they changed a lot over time.
Parry had discovered what Wood and Wolf had missed: the evidence that the poems had been transmitted orally was right there in the text itself.
Ability to write in a clear and concise manner and to communicate effectively orally.
At the bottom right, orally-active compounds against more conventional extracellular targets is a tricky one.
